title: DestriumMod
description: DestriumMod is a Mods based on Exploration, Building, Tools and Machines!
body:
DestriumMod

**DestriumMod is a Mods based on Exploration, Building, Tools and Machines !** You have the possibility to explore a multitude of dimensions, to collect the blocks to make magnificent build, to look for materials for your weapons, armor and machines! ### **Feature :** * New Dimension : Paradis * 3 new Seeds * 3 new Minerals * 3 new Armors and Tools * 2 new Fluids * 2 new Foods * 2 new piece of armor like Amulets * 5 new Boots with multiple effects * 2 new Flowers * More than 50 new Blocks * New craft for Vanilla Items * Lot of other Items  DestriumMod is a constantly evolving Minecraft Mod ! Every update new things are added ! This can be items, blocks or even dimensions, machines, plantations, food and many other things ! **FAQ:** * _Which version is supported?_ The main version supported by the Mods is 1.16.5. The Mods also support 1.18.2, 1.19.4 and work is being done to support versions 1.20.5 and future other versions. * _Is there a discord server related to DestriumMod ?_ Yes, we have a discord server related to DestriumMod. To access the chanel related to DestriumMod, you must go to the role chanel and choose the DestriumMod role !
https://discord.com/invite/FMjuQYdBsJ
* _Can i include DestriumMod in my ModPack ?_ Yes ! * _I have an issue / bug / report / request, where can i send it ?_ You can send it to the discord server or to the GitHub Issues Page !
